feedback.question: Did the calculation help you identify an error in your pay stub?

about.title: About the System
paragraphs: Shiftly is a work hours and salary calculation system designed for hourly security employees in government offices.
The system reconstructs the calculation logic as it appears in Merkava system reports, aiming to enable simulation, verification, and understanding of the monthly pay slip calculation.
The displayed result is gross salary, calculated based on work hours only.

disclaimer.title: Liability & Calculation
paragraphs: The calculation displayed in the system is indicative only.
There may be scenarios where the calculation does not fully match the official result, due to exceptions, updates, or missing data.
The system is not a substitute for an official payroll system or accounting.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Usage
paragraphs: The system does not store personal information, salary data, work hours, or user identification details.
The system does not perform user identification and does not use cookies for advertising or cross-site tracking purposes.
Basic anonymous usage analytics may be used (such as page views and general interactions) to improve calculation clarity and user experience.
Collected data is aggregated and does not allow identification of a person, pay slip, or specific workplace.
